must_have_skills: Data visualization (Tableau, Power BI, or Looker)
Python for data analysis (pandas, numpy, matplotlib)
nice_to_have_skills: Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure)
Experience with dbt or similar transformation tools
Experience with product analytics tools (Amplitude, Mixpanel)
core_problems_to_solve: Work with large datasets to uncover insights, build dashboards, and support data-driven decision making across the organization. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify opportunities and drive business impact through data. Conduct A/B testing and statistical analysis to inform product decisions.
